titleStmt.title: SII 15.258: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 258. (B.K. No. 435 of 1926.) DĒVARA HUBBAḶḶI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the entrance into the village.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Āśvija śu. 2, Thursday, corresponding to 1547 A.D., September 15, Thursday, f.d.t. °10.

It records the remission of taxes in favour of barbers represented by Koṇḍōja Timmōja and Bhadrōja by Rāmarājayya, the Kāryakartta of the king. Reference is made to Muguda Thirty and Kāṇāchī in the supplementary section.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁbi caṁ
dracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē svasti śrī vi
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣasānirada
nānūra Aṟuvatoṁbhata neya plavaṁga
saṁvatsarada Āvasija śu 2 gu lū śrīmaṁnmā
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara śrī vīrapa
tāpa sadāsivarāya mahārāya
ra kā¨ryyaka¨rttarāda rāmarājayya dēvaru
Arasugaḷa kelasigaru tiṁmōja koṁ
ḍōja bhadrōjagaḷige rāmarāja
mahāArasugaḷū taṁma kelasi
gariga rāyarāḷuva rājyadoḷa
ge nāviṁdarige biṭi birāḍa sa¨rvamāṁ
nya yī birāḍa manederige yidake Ā
vanutappidavana bāyalli
ma¨rtta sva¨rgalōkakke
hōda phala śubhamastu caṁdrasū
¨ryyaru yaṁttu maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī
muguda mū śrī vattu
ḷige kāṇācigaḷanu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
